extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows, excluding all “By” rows; criminal proceedings are Nil for the Company, subsidiaries, directors and promoters, statutory/regulatory proceedings are Nil, and tax proceedings are 17 against the Company plus 2 against subsidiaries. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiaries is ₹76.35 million plus ₹0.58 million, or ₹76.93 million, excluding promoter/director matters and all “By” rows; converted at ₹10 million per crore, this is ₹7.693 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹970.09 million as of June 30, 2022, not a sum of line items, converted to ₹97.009 crore. Company-wide customer concentration for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2022, is measured as a percentage of revenue from operations: top 5 customers were 37.23% and top 10 customers were 51.02%; the source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
